description: Months later, on another predicted portal day, Simmons and Will wait together and share a bottle of old wine. When Simmons spots Fitz’s flare, she races toward it, but is confronted by the entity manifesting as an astronaut in the storm. Will risks himself to save Simmons, urging her to run for the portal. Amid chaos and confusion, Simmons escapes, but Will’s fate remains uncertain as she hears Fitz calling for her on the other side.
location: Maveth (alien planet accessed via the Kree monolith)

transcript.line: I think my dad would've liked you. Sometimes, you remind me... It's Fitz! He found a way! We're going home! Come on! We can make it! It's just over the ridge!
Jemma! Jemma, stop! Get back here! Jemma, stop!
Will, come on. What are you doing?! Oh, no. Not now.
Jemma, go. You can make it.
I'm not going without you! Will! Will! Will! They came for you! It wasn't Fitz! It's one of yours!
Jemma, run! It's not what you think it is!
It's okay! We're going home!
Don't trust it! It'll do anything to fool you!
Oh, God. It's here. It's here! Will!
Jemma, Jemma, Jemma, look at me, look at me, look at me. Run, run. Go!
Yes, you can make it. Go!
No! No! No! Will!
Go, Jemma!
Will! Will! No! Will!
Jemma! Jemma, are you there?!
Fitz?!
Jemma!
Fitz, can you hear me?!
Jemma?! Jemma!
Come on, Will. Come on, come on. Fitz!
